crime.value: Multiple stab wounds murder at a high school bonfire
crime.quote: Matty had multiple stab wounds, there was blood everywhere.

victim.value: Matty, a high school senior who was manipulated into attending the bonfire
victim.quote: "She said that?" He asked. "Thats what i thought, I will pick you up at 8," said Jackson.

closed_world.value: Senior bonfire gathering with limited group of friends from middle school
closed_world.quote: "we have all been friends since middle school"

investigator.value: Police conducting interrogation of the friend group as suspects
investigator.quote: "It seems to appear that one of you are responsible for Mathew Devells death"

suspect_architecture.value: Four friends from a tight social group: Jackson (manipulator with access to both victims), Amber (protective of group dynamics), Mitch (evasive about relationship status), plus unnamed 10th grader who 'discovered' body
suspect_architecture.quote: It seems to appear that one of you are responsible for Mathew Devells death

red_herring.value: Jackson's romantic manipulation setup - he lies to both Matty and Kaylee about the other wanting them at the bonfire, creating false romantic motive
red_herring.quote: Well, dont tell him I told you but, Matty Said he was hoping you were going to be there

social_world.value: High school senior friend group with established hierarchy - Amber as protective gatekeeper of group dynamics, Jackson as social manipulator, underlying tensions about romantic relationships threatening group stability
social_world.quote: we have all been friends since middle school, and I dont want you guys screwing it up

alibi.value: Jackson has timeline control - he picks up multiple people at different times (Matty at 8, Kaylee at 7, Mitch at 7:30) giving him opportunity to manipulate whereabouts
